response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS), and agentic workflows including MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his AI experience is embedded within broader full-stack work rather than as a primary domain.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq.
Extensive full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and cloud-native deployment patterns.
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership across diverse domains and teams.
concerns: No clear demonstration of 8+ years dedicated to production AI systems — AI work appears secondary to general full-stack roles.
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI.
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or building AI evaluation/observability pipelines for enterprise customers.
